{{Quote|Capture the leadership of both sides in the Sepan Civil War. They will be vulnerable to capture during a deep space rendezvous near Sepan 8.|[[Imperial briefing officer]]|<ref name="TF" />}}
'''Sepan 8''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Sepan system/Legends|Sepan system]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a part of the [[Sepan sector/Legends|Sepan sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Quote|As it turns out, the individuals we captured are not the Dimok and Ripoblus leaders, but the children of both sides' leaders. Apparently, they were to be used as hostages in a cynical attempt by each side to assure the others adherence to a new treaty. This treaty calls for an immediate suspension of hostilities between them. Furthermore, they intend to join forces against us!|Imperial briefing officer|<ref name="TF" />}}
The [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] and the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] [[Battle of Sepan 8|assembled]] near Sepan 8 to ally against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TF" />

{{Planet-stub}}
